name: cloudflare-ddns
description: Cloudflare Worker that acts as a DDNS provider for Synology NAS and other clients.

scripts.predeploy: node ./scripts/verify-setup.mjs && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local && wrangler dev
scripts.test: wrangler deploy --dry-run && npx vitest run --config tests/vitest.config.mts
